title: [ControlFlowHub] Fix duplicate DomTree updates when branch successors are identical
author: shiltian
description:
When a conditional branch has both successors pointing to the same block (e.g., `br i1 %cond, label %bb, label %bb`), `ControlFlowHub::finalize` generates duplicate `Delete` updates for the same CFG edge. This can cause assertion in `fix-irreducible` pass.

Fixes #176553.

tests.test_body:
declare void @foo()

define void @bar(i32 %0) {
entry:
  br label %bb.1

bb.1:                                             ; preds = %entry
  %v.0 = icmp slt i32 %0, 35
  br i1 %v.0, label %bb.3, label %bb.2

bb.2:                                             ; preds = %bb.1
  %v.1 = icmp slt i32 %0, 47
  br i1 %v.1, label %bb.5, label %bb.5

bb.3:                                             ; preds = %bb.1
  %v.2 = icmp eq i32 %0, 0
  br i1 %v.2, label %bb.6, label %bb.4

bb.4:                                             ; preds = %bb.6, %bb.3
  br label %bb.5

bb.5:                                             ; preds = %bb.4, %bb.2, %bb.2
  %v.3 = phi i32 [ 0, %bb.4 ], [ 1, %bb.2 ], [ 1, %bb.2 ]
  %v.4 = icmp eq i32 %v.3, 0
  br i1 true, label %bb.6, label %bb.7

bb.6:                                             ; preds = %bb.5, %bb.3
  %v.5 = phi i32 [ %v.3, %bb.5 ], [ 0, %bb.3 ]
  call void @foo()
  br label %bb.4

bb.7:                                             ; preds = %bb.5
  ret void
}

define void @baz(i1 %v.0, i1 %v.1) {
entry:
  br i1 %v.0, label %bb.1, label %bb.2

bb.1:                                             ; preds = %entry
  br label %bb.4

bb.2:                                             ; preds = %entry
  br i1 %v.1, label %bb.3, label %bb.3

bb.3:                                             ; preds = %bb.4, %bb.2, %bb.2
  br label %bb.4

bb.4:                                             ; preds = %bb.1, %bb.3
  br label %bb.3
}
